full_text:
Xun Kai 荀愷
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Kai (荀愷). Saved Zhong Hui at Nanzheng by shooting Lu Xun. Popular with the Sima’s. Xun Kai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
